suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Address pre-existing `pnpm lint` warnings for unused variables in validator E2E test files (`e2e/validator-public-docs-group-1.spec.ts`, `e2e/validator-public-docs-group-2.spec.ts`) and consider ignoring or cleaning up untracked temporary files (`playwright-validator.config.ts`, `transcript_skeleton.txt`).
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Observed by workers in `workspace-admin-non-success-guards` and `canonical-labels-and-ai-provenance` features.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Note that `agent-browser` may fail to start on Windows environments due to daemon port binding errors. Workers can fallback to executing raw headless Playwright scripts via the Execute tool when browser testing is required.
